prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Maserati 4.7L F136Y V8** (from the GranTurismo MC Stradale) with a **Weber Motorsport Stage 2+ ECU remap** (optimized for 480+ HP on 98 RON fuel), paired with a **Novitec Tridente forged crankshaft** and **CP-Carrillo billet connecting rods** to handle 8,500 RPM safely. Upgraded **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (11.5:1 compression) and **Ferrea Racing titanium intake/exhaust valves** with **Supertech valve springs** for high-lift camshaft compatibility.

Forced induction via **Rotrex C38-91 supercharger** (custom-mapped by **G-Power** for 7.5 PSI boost) with a **PWR Racing intercooler** (core dimensions: 600x300x76mm) and **Silicone Intakes 4-ply silicone charge pipes** (reinforced with **TurboSmart 45mm wastegate** for boost control). **Mocal oil cooler** (19-row) and **Setrab 50-row transmission cooler** to manage heat under sustained load.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **ZF 6HP28A transmission** (from the Quattroporte Sport GT S) with **Vaico reinforced clutch pack** and **South Bend Stage 3 twin-disc clutch** (ceramic-metallic). **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2.5-way) for the rear axle, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** (380mm discs) and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for fade resistance. **KW Variant 3 coilovers** (custom valved for Sebring chassis) with **Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers** to clear upgraded brakes.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Sebring-specific widebody kit** (hand-laid carbon fiber, 50mm extended fenders) with **custom front splitter** (integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing** for 150kg downforce at 180mph). **OEM+ carbon fiber hood** (from the Maserati MC12 Corsa) with **custom NACA ducts** for brake cooling.

**Dymag Assetto Magnesio wheels** (19x9.5 ET25 front, 19x11 ET30 rear) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (265/30/19 front, 305/30/19 rear). **Custom 3M Matte Viola wrap** (Maserati’s signature color) with **Avery Dennison Gloss Black accents** on the grille, side skirts, and rear diffuser.

**Recaro Pole Position seats** (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara/leather upholstery) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, 350mm diameter) with **AiM MXS 1.2 Strada dash** (integrated **Bosch LSU 4.9 wideband O2 sensor** and **AEM X-Series boost gauge**). **Custom LED taillights** (replica of the **Maserati MC20** design) with **Philips X-tremeUltinon Pro9000 bulbs** for modern aesthetics.
